prompt_improvements.improvement: Require the implementor to verify every --cov target maps to an actually imported module path and to fix mismatches before final validation.
Explicitly require at least one test where persistence of the failed payload itself fails (e.g., write_failed raises) and expected behavior is asserted.
Require one explicit test per listed boundary value (23, 24, 28, 29) with direct assertion mapping noted in the final checklist.
